title: Saturative
description: Just a hunger and saturation overhaul
body:
Minecraft hunger and saturation system is boring for you? This mod gives some changes to it.

### What does this mod do?
It overwrites the default minecraft hunger and saturation system so it makes it possible to eat food as more as you can. No limits! But... Don't explode! Also this mod adds an overeating so you need to keep your hunger bar in good state.

### How this hunger and saturation system work?
Your hunger bar has 3 modes: starving, normal and overeating. Default minecraft system has 20 hunger points. This mod has 400 hunger points. The range from 0 to 100 is the starving mode. It means that player needs to eat. If hunger bar is too close to zero it will damage player. Also it gives him some bad effects. The range from 100 to 300 is the normal mode. It means that player successfully spends his saturation to heal. The range from 300 to 400 is the overeating mode. It means that player needs to go on a diet... Or to drink some water. If hunger bar is too close to the maximum value it will damage player (the same as with hunger).

### What about other mods compatiblity?
Now it supports the Farmer's Delight (refabricated) mod 1.20.1 and Appleskin's saturation bar.

### Photos? Ok
![Starving mode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc8ba24b651f10b67030817e19bd510bb18be8b3.png)
![Normal mode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5218f4dafabafedf470c7401d1ee593748851a38.png)
![Overeating mode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cf7dac0281bb60763ac8c0b99ac768786b50ebc.png)
![Farmer's Delight nourishment effect and Appleskin's saturation bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd6a2c211a7316194418aa28cff1f79e1056e621.png)

### What about porting mod to other versions or mod loaders?
I am not planning to port it to older versions and to other mod loaders now. (But you always can suggest it on my discord server)

### Have an idea?
Suggest it on my discord server

### P.s.
Sorry for my bad english :)
I am from Russia..

Sorry for updates latency...
It seems like this project will not be supported by me further...
